content.json:
# Azure AI Continuous Assurance
Focused security signals for assurance runs, sensitive Azure changes, and rejected AI tool escalation. Only content-minimized operational metadata enters this workspace; prompts and responses are excluded.

content.query: AicaAssurance_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | summarize Runs=count(), Completed=countif(Status =~ 'COMPLETED'), ReviewRequired=countif(Status =~ 'REVIEW_REQUIRED'), Failed=countif(Status =~ 'FAILED'), Latest=max(TimeGenerated) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Assurance run health (14 days)

content.query: AzureActivity | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | where ActivityStatusValue =~ 'Success' | where OperationNameValue in~ ('MICROSOFT.AUTHORIZATION/ROLEASSIGNMENTS/WRITE','MICROSOFT.AUTHORIZATION/ROLEASSIGNMENTS/DELETE','MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKSECURITYGROUPS/WRITE','MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKSECURITYGROUPS/SECURITYRULES/WRITE','MICROSOFT.INSIGHTS/DIAGNOSTICSETTINGS/DELETE') | summarize Changes=count() by OperationNameValue, Caller | order by Changes desc
content.title: Sensitive Azure changes (24 hours)

content.query: AicaToolSecurity_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize Interactions=count(), Rejected=countif(Status =~ 'REJECTED'), GuardrailInteractions=countif(array_length(GuardrailOutcomes) > 0), AverageLatencyMs=round(avg(LatencyMs), 1), InputTokens=sum(InputTokens), OutputTokens=sum(OutputTokens), Latest=max(TimeGenerated) by Model, ModelVersion | order by Interactions desc
content.title: Assistant operational health (24 hours)

content.query: AicaToolSecurity_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | where EventName =~ 'tool_authorization' | where ToolResultStatus =~ 'REJECTED' or AuthorizationDecision =~ 'DENIED' | summarize Rejections=count(), Tools=make_set(ToolName, 10), Evaluations=make_set(EvaluationId, 20) by UserPseudonym, SessionId | order by Rejections desc
content.title: Rejected tool requests (24 hours)

content.json: Public service endpoints are an accepted student-cost residual risk. Access is protected by Entra ID/RBAC, local authentication is disabled where supported, and only synthetic/pseudonymous security events enter this workspace.
